purpose: Ensure generated business/admin pages use Sanofi Icon/ButtonIcon provenance for functional icons instead of text glyph fallbacks.

icon.decorative_accessibility: Decorative icons must be hidden from assistive technology with aria-hidden="true".
icon.interactive_accessibility: Interactive icon-only controls must put aria-label on the button or anchor and hide the inner Icon from assistive technology.

notes: Business/admin compact pages may use explicit role-based icon sizes instead of the Icon API default.
Role-based icon size must be exposed through data-icon-size so validators can distinguish deliberate compact usage from arbitrary scaling.

rules.description: Do not use bare text glyphs such as +, -, arrows, or box symbols as functional icons.
allowed_text_separators: breadcrumb separators such as › when they are not inside an icon role or interactive affordance

rules.description: When business admin defaults are active, every top-level navigation item must include an Icon primitive with data-icon-role="navigation".
Sidebar expand/collapse affordances must use Icon primitive provenance and must not be naked SVG or arrow text.
Tree expand/collapse controls must be fixed-size buttons with aria-label, aria-expanded, and a child Icon primitive named add/remove.
Search, date, select, and similar form-control icons must use Icon provenance and edge-safe spacing.
Action-link arrows or swap affordances must use Icon primitive provenance instead of inline text arrows.
